_comment: Melaka election metadata. No polling date exists yet: the assembly's five-year term runs from Dec 2021, auto-dissolves around Dec 2026, and polls are due by late Feb 2027. Update polling_date/early_voting_date/nomination_date the day SPR announces, and switch the pipeline's saluran/roll sources to the mlk_se16 lake files when they appear.

election.note_bm: Tarikh belum diumumkan — penggal DUN berakhir Dis 2026, pilihan raya perlu diadakan menjelang akhir Feb 2027.
election.note_en: Date not yet announced — the assembly's term ends Dec 2026, so polls are due by late Feb 2027.
